clauses.obligation: Personal franchise to operate 1 AF center at specified location

clauses.restriction: Territory per Rider; franchisor will not place another AF center in territory but can operate other brands
clauses.exceptions: Private fitness centers (employees/guests only); other brands anywhere

clauses.obligation: May renew for 5 years if: in good standing, sign new agreement (may have materially different terms), pay $7,500, sign release, update facility, staff completes refresher training
Pay $820/month royalty
clauses.trigger: Upon opening; after 12 months if not open
clauses.money: $820/month; can be replaced with up to 8% of Gross Revenue on 30 days' notice

clauses.obligation: Pay $600/month to General Advertising and Marketing Fund
clauses.money: Cannot exceed greater of $600 or 2% Gross Revenue

clauses.obligation: Pay $799/month Base Technology Fee to ProVision
Select site with franchisor approval; 12 months to open
Build out per Compliance Drawing and Construction Documents from designated architect
Principal Operator and Principal Owner must complete initial training
Comply with Operations Manual; may be modified at franchisor's discretion
Maintain GL $1M/$1M/$3M aggregate + other required coverage; name franchisor as additional insured
Purchase and maintain health club surety bond from designated vendor
Maintain books/records; franchisor has independent access to all computer/iPad data with no limits
Franchisor may inspect center; failure = re-inspection fees ($50-$100)

clauses.trigger: Non-curable: liquidation, 7 days non-operation, unapproved transfer, fraud, 3 breaches in 12 months, false books, mark misuse. Curable: 30 days to cure most defaults
Material breach by franchisor + 30 day cure + 10 day notice (subject to state law)

clauses.obligation: Stop operating, stop using marks, return info, assign phone/web/listings, pay all amounts owed

clauses.restriction: Franchisor approval required; transferee signs new agreement on current form; transfer fee $9,999 (open) or $25,000 (pre-open)

clauses.right: Franchisor may match any offer to purchase franchise
Franchisor can purchase assets at book value upon termination/expiration without renewal

clauses.restriction: No involvement in any fitness/gym/training/nutrition/recovery business anywhere
clauses.exceptions: Pre-first-opening employment in non-keyless club <18 hrs/day if no ownership

clauses.restriction: 2 years; within territory + 10 mi of any AF center (5 mi in metro >50K)
No disclosure of proprietary info; no use for AI/ML training; no input to generative AI without consent

clauses.obligation: Mediation first (mediator-selected location); then arbitration in Minneapolis, MN; litigation in MN courts
All owners and spouses must sign Personal Guaranty; joint/several/unlimited liability; waives notices, pursuit of other remedies, and other defenses
Must sign general release upon renewal or transfer (subject to state law)
Must reimburse franchisor for claims arising from your business
$10,000 per undeveloped center under ADA

clauses.trigger: Default under any FA, ADA, or agreement with any affiliate triggers termination of all

clauses.restriction: No modifications without mutual consent; but Operations Manual can change unilaterally

clauses.obligation: Only written terms binding; no other promises enforceable (subject to FDD representations and state law)

guaranty_scope: Personal, spousal, unlimited, joint and several — all owners and their spouses
distinctive_clauses: 8% royalty switch on 30 days' notice (Section 4, Note 4 in Item 6)
10% annual tech fee escalator (compounded and cumulative)
AI/generative AI prohibition on confidential information
Book value purchase option at termination/expiration
Pattern default (3 material breaches in 12 months = non-curable)
